assertions.scriptName: Add Foreign Key Constraint
assertions.query: ALTER TABLE parent ADD FOREIGN KEY (c1) REFERENCES child (pk) ON DELETE CASCADE;

assertions.scriptName: Add Foreign Key Constraint
assertions.query: INSERT INTO parent VALUES (10, 10, 10);

assertions.scriptName: Add Foreign Key Constraint
assertions.query: ALTER TABLE parent ADD FOREIGN KEY (c2) REFERENCES child (pk);

assertions.scriptName: Add Foreign Key Constraint
assertions.query: ALTER TABLE parent ADD FOREIGN KEY (c1, c2) REFERENCES child (pk, c1);

assertions.scriptName: Add Foreign Key Constraint
assertions.query: ALTER TABLE parent ADD CONSTRAINT match_full_single FOREIGN KEY (c1) REFERENCES child (pk) MATCH FULL;

assertions.scriptName: Add Foreign Key Constraint
assertions.query: INSERT INTO parent VALUES (20, 20, 20);

assertions.scriptName: Add Foreign Key Constraint
assertions.query: INSERT INTO parent VALUES (20, NULL, 20);

assertions.scriptName: Add Foreign Key Constraint
assertions.query: ALTER TABLE parent ADD FOREIGN KEY (c1, c2) REFERENCES child (pk, c1) MATCH FULL;

assertions.scriptName: Add Foreign Key Constraint
assertions.query: ALTER TABLE parent ADD FOREIGN KEY (c1, c2) REFERENCES child (pk, c1) MATCH PARTIAL;

assertions.scriptName: Add Unique Constraint
assertions.query: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX ON t1(c1);

assertions.scriptName: Add Unique Constraint
assertions.query: INSERT INTO t1 VALUES (2, 1);

assertions.scriptName: Add Unique Constraint
assertions.query: ALTER TABLE t2 ADD CONSTRAINT uniq1 UNIQUE (c1);

assertions.scriptName: Add Unique Constraint
assertions.query: INSERT INTO t2 VALUES (2, 1);

assertions.scriptName: Add Check Constraint
assertions.query: ALTER TABLE t1 ADD CONSTRAINT constraint1 CHECK (c1 > 100);

assertions.scriptName: Add Check Constraint
assertions.query: ALTER TABLE t1 ADD CONSTRAINT constraint1 CHECK (c1 < 100);

assertions.scriptName: Add Check Constraint
assertions.query: INSERT INTO t1 VALUES (2, 2);

assertions.scriptName: Add Check Constraint
assertions.query: INSERT INTO t1 VALUES (3, 101);

assertions.scriptName: Add Check Constraint with IN tuple
assertions.query: ALTER TABLE t1 ADD CONSTRAINT constraint1 CHECK (c1 in (100));

assertions.scriptName: Add Check Constraint with IN tuple
assertions.query: ALTER TABLE t1 ADD CONSTRAINT constraint1 CHECK (c1 in (1,2));

assertions.scriptName: Add Check Constraint with IN tuple
assertions.query: INSERT INTO t1 VALUES (2, 2);

assertions.scriptName: Add Check Constraint with IN tuple
assertions.query: INSERT INTO t1 VALUES (3, 101);

assertions.scriptName: Add Check Constraint and another constraint in same statement
assertions.query: ALTER TABLE t1 ADD CONSTRAINT check_a CHECK (c1 IN (1)), ALTER c1 SET NOT NULL;

assertions.scriptName: Add Check Constraint and another constraint in same statement
assertions.query: INSERT INTO t1 VALUES (2, 2);

assertions.scriptName: Add Check Constraint and another constraint in same statement
assertions.query: INSERT INTO t1 VALUES (1, NULL);

assertions.scriptName: Drop Constraint
assertions.query: ALTER TABLE t1 DROP CONSTRAINT constraint1;

assertions.scriptName: Drop Constraint
assertions.query: INSERT INTO t1 VALUES (1, 1);

assertions.scriptName: Drop Constraint
assertions.query: ALTER TABLE t1 DROP CONSTRAINT doesnotexist;

assertions.scriptName: Drop Constraint
assertions.query: ALTER TABLE t1 DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS doesnotexist;

assertions.scriptName: Add Primary Key
assertions.query: ALTER TABLE test1 ADD PRIMARY KEY (a);

assertions.query: INSERT into test1 values (1, 2), (1, 3);

assertions.query: ALTER TABLE test2 ADD PRIMARY KEY (a, b);

assertions.query: INSERT into test2 values (1, 2, 3), (1, 2, 4);

assertions.scriptName: Add Primary Key
assertions.query: ALTER TABLE pkTable1 ADD PRIMARY KEY (a);

assertions.scriptName: Add Primary Key
assertions.query: ALTER TABLE duplicateRows ADD PRIMARY KEY (a);

assertions.scriptName: Add Primary Key
assertions.query: ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS doesNotExist ADD PRIMARY KEY (a, b);

assertions.scriptName: Add Primary Key on text column
assertions.query: ALTER TABLE test1 ADD PRIMARY KEY (a);

assertions.scriptName: Add Primary Key on text column
assertions.query: INSERT into test1 values ('a', 3);

assertions.query: select * from test1;

assertions.query: Select has_data from t1;

assertions.query: ALTER TABLE test1 ADD COLUMN c INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 42;

assertions.query: select * from test1;

assertions.scriptName: Add Column
assertions.query: ALTER TABLE test1 ADD COLUMN l non_existing_type;

assertions.scriptName: Add Column
assertions.query: ALTER TABLE test1 ADD COLUMN m xid;

assertions.scriptName: Add column with inline check constraint
assertions.query: ALTER TABLE test1 ADD COLUMN c INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 42 CONSTRAINT chk1 CHECK (c > 0);

assertions.scriptName: Add column with inline check constraint
assertions.query: INSERT INTO test1 VALUES (2, 2, -2);

assertions.scriptName: Add column with inline check constraint to table with existing data
assertions.query: ALTER TABLE test1 ADD COLUMN c INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 42 CONSTRAINT chk1 CHECK (c > 0);

assertions.scriptName: Add column with inline check constraint to table with existing data
assertions.query: INSERT INTO test1 VALUES (2, 2, -2);

assertions.scriptName: Add column with inline check constraint to table with existing data
assertions.query: ALTER TABLE test1 ADD COLUMN c2 INT CONSTRAINT chk2 CHECK (c2 IS NOT NULL);

assertions.scriptName: ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN with inline FK constraint
assertions.query: SELECT conname AS constraint_name, pg_get_constraintdef(oid) AS constraint_definition FROM pg_constraint WHERE conrelid = 't'::regclass AND contype='f';

assertions.scriptName: alter table add primary key with uuid column default values
assertions.query: select (select uid from t1 where id = 2) = (select uid from t1 where id = 1);

assertions.query: ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS t1a ALTER COLUMN a SET NOT NULL;

assertions.scriptName: ALTER TABLE with schema defined that is not the current schema
assertions.query: ALTER TABLE ONLY grassroots.users ADD CONSTRAINT users_email_key UNIQUE (email);

assertions.scriptName: setting foreign key to SET NULL on NOT NULL defined column
assertions.query:
ALTER TABLE ONLY public.products
		   ADD CONSTRAINT fk_category_id FOREIGN KEY (category_id) REFERENCES public.categories(category_id) ON UPDATE SET NULL ON DELETE SET NULL;

assertions.scriptName: setting foreign key to SET NULL on NOT NULL defined column
assertions.query: DELETE FROM categories WHERE category_id = 1;

assertions.scriptName: use double quoted column name for SET DEFAULT
assertions.query: ALTER TABLE ONLY pages_links ALTER COLUMN "idRefferer" SET DEFAULT nextval('pages_links_idrefferer_seq'::regclass);

assertions.scriptName: use double quoted column name for SET DEFAULT
assertions.query: INSERT INTO pages_links ("idDestination") VALUES (1);

assertions.scriptName: use double quoted column name for SET DEFAULT
assertions.query: SELECT "idRefferer"::text, "idDestination"::text FROM pages_links;

assertions.scriptName: foreign key names can be the same but should be on different tables
assertions.query:
ALTER TABLE ONLY public.boards
    ADD CONSTRAINT fk_project_id FOREIGN KEY (project_id) REFERENCES public.projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE;
